basic_details.job_title: CMHO Bemetara Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 52 Support Staff, Pharmacists and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Chief Medical and Health Office Bemetara (CMHO Bemetara)
basic_details.short_information: Chief Medical and Health Office Bemetara (CMHO Bemetara) has officially released the Various Contractual Posts Recruitment 2026 notification (Advt. No. क्र./एन.ए.एम./एच.आर./2025-26/669) for 52 vacancies across Bemetara, Chhattisgarh. Eligible candidates with qualifications including 12th Pass, ANM, B.Sc Nursing, GNM, Post Basic Nursing, DMLT/BMLT, BPT, Diploma in Dental Technology, BHMS/BAMS/BUMS, PG Degree/Diploma in Psychology/Social Work, DTYDHH, 10th Pass, B.Com with PGDCA, and Diploma in Pharmacy aged between 18 to 70 years can apply through offline mode on or before 14 August 2026. Selec

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 70 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th Passed, ANM, B.Sc Nursing, GNM, Post Basic Nursing, DMLT/BMLT, BPT, Diploma in Dental Technology, BHMS/BAMS/BUMS, PG Degree/Diploma in Psychology/Social Work, DTYDHH, 10th Passed, B.Com + PGDCA, Diploma in Pharmacy
qualification.details: 2nd ANM: 12th passed, ANM Passed & INC affiliated Training Centre & Live Registration in Chhattisgarh Nursing Registration Council. Nursing Officer: B.Sc. Nursing Course Passed & Live Registration in CG Nursing Council OR Post Basic Nursing Course Passed & Live Registration in CG Nursing Council OR GNM Course Passed & Live Registration in CG Nursing Council. Laboratory Technicians - DPHL/BPHU: DMLT/ BMLT/ Pathology in Paramedical Course with Live Registration in CG Paramedical council. Physiotherapist: Bachelor's Degree in Physiotherapy (B.P.T.). Dental Assistant: Diploma in Dental Technology from a recognized institution. MO-AYUSH: BHMS/BAMS/BUMS Degree Registration from any GOI Recognized (BAMS/BHMS/BUMS) Ayush, Homeo, Unani registration Board. Staff Nurse - SNCU/NBSU: B.Sc. Nursing Course Passed & Live Registration in CG Nursing Council OR Post Basic Nursing Course Passed & Live Registration in CG Nursing Council OR GNM Course Passed & Live Registration in CG Nursing Council. Community Health Officer: B.Sc. Nursing with Certificate in Community Health Integrated (CCH) Course Passed & Live Registration in CG Nursing Council OR Post Basic with Certificate in Community Health Integrated (CCH) Course Passed & Live Registration in CG Nursing Council. Counselor - NHM: PG Degree/Diploma in Psychology/counselling/Health Education/Mass Communication/Social Science/ Master of Social Worker (MSW). Technical Assistant - Hearing Impaired Children: Diploma in Training young deaf and hearing handicapped (DTYDHH) from RCI recognized institute. Support Staff (Housekeeping staff)/ 4th class: 10th Passed. Block Manager - Account: B.com (minimum 55%)+1 Year Computer Diploma (PGDCA) Knowledged Tally. Jr. Secretrial Assistant (PADA): 12th Passed with at least 01 year computer diploma. Pharmacists: Degree or Diploma in Pharmacy (50%) & Registration in Pharmacy Registration Council. TBHV: Graduate in science OR Intermediate (10+2) in science and experience of working as MPW/LHV/ANM/Health Worker/Certificate or higher course in Health Education/Counselling OR Tuberculosis health visitor's recognized course OR Certificate course in computer operations (minimum two months).

selection_process: Document Scrutiny Document Verification Skill Test Merit List
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CMHO Bemetara Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.bemetara.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CMHO Bemetara Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CMHO Bemetara Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CMHO Bemetara Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: 2nd ANM: 12th passed, ANM Passed & INC affiliated Training Centre & Live Registration in Chhattisgarh Nursing Registration Council. Nursing Officer: B.Sc. Nursing Course Passed & Live Registration in CG Nursing Council OR Post Basic Nursing Course Passed & Live Registration in CG Nursing Council OR GNM Course Passed & Live Registration in CG Nursing Council. Laboratory Technicians - DPHL/BPHU: DMLT/ BMLT/ Pathology in Paramedical Course with Live Registration in CG Paramedical council. Physiotherapist: Bachelor's Degree in Physiotherapy (B.P.T.). Dental Assistant: Diploma in Dental Technology from a recognized institution. MO-AYUSH: BHMS/BAMS/BUMS Degree Registration from any GOI Recognized (BAMS/BHMS/BUMS) Ayush, Homeo, Unani registration Board. Staff Nurse - SNCU/NBSU: B.Sc. Nursing Course Passed & Live Registration in CG Nursing Council OR Post Basic Nursing Course Passed & Live Registration in CG Nursing Council OR GNM Course Passed & Live Registration in CG Nursing Council. Community Health Officer: B.Sc. Nursing with Certificate in Community Health Integrated (CCH) Course Passed & Live Registration in CG Nursing Council OR Post Basic with Certificate in Community Health Integrated (CCH) Course Passed & Live Registration in CG Nursing Council. Counselor - NHM: PG Degree/Diploma in Psychology/counselling/Health Education/Mass Communication/Social Science/ Master of Social Worker (MSW). Technical Assistant - Hearing Impaired Children: Diploma in Training young deaf and hearing handicapped (DTYDHH) from RCI recognized institute. Support Staff (Housekeeping staff)/ 4th class: 10th Passed. Block Manager - Account: B.com (minimum 55%)+1 Year Computer Diploma (PGDCA) Knowledged Tally. Jr. Secretrial Assistant (PADA): 12th Passed with at least 01 year computer diploma. Pharmacists: Degree or Diploma in Pharmacy (50%) & Registration in Pharmacy Registration Council. TBHV: Graduate in science OR Intermediate (10+2) in science and experience of working as MPW/LHV/ANM/Health Worker/Certificate or higher course in Health Education/Counselling OR Tuberculosis health visitor's recognized course OR Certificate course in computer operations (minimum two months).

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 70 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Document Scrutiny Document Verification Skill Test Merit List

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CMHO Bemetara Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.bemetara.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CMHO Bemetara Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the CMHO Bemetara Various Contractual Posts is 14th August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned office by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in CMHO Bemetara Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 52 vacancies announced for various contractual posts under the Chief Medical and Health Office Bemetara recruitment drive for the year 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the CMHO Bemetara Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all the posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 70 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these contractual posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the contractual posts ranges from Rs. 8800 to Rs. 25000 per month, depending on the specific post and its responsibilities.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary for each post, ranging from 10th pass to B.Sc. Nursing, Diploma in Pharmacy, and other specialized degrees/diplomas as detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for CMHO Bemetara Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves Document Scrutiny, Document Verification, a Skill Test, and finally, the preparation of a Merit List.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Chief Medical and Health Office Bemetara, which is www.bemetara.gov.in.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application fee for different categories?
faq.answer: The application fee varies: Rs. 100 for Divyang/SC/ST, Rs. 200 for OBC/Women, and Rs. 300 for Unreserved category candidates.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, these are contractual posts. The recruitment is for a fixed tenure as specified in the official notification.
